chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 976 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 13.01.2026 Mr. Sajid Ali Maitlo, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Chaddar, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter to some length, requires the bail application to be disposed of with direction that the learned trial Court may attempt for conclusion of the trial within a reasonable period. Learned Counsel for the complainant as well as learned DPG extends no objection. Accordingly, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of two months. Interim order dated 08.10.2025 stands recalled. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
